{{Infobox group
| name = Nye
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Nye Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] are humanoid entities composed of shadow and cloth rather than flesh. Functioning as the keepers of a [[House]], they perform domestic duties such as sweeping and laundry, but they are also capable of attacking outsiders by attempting to strangle them with chains. In combat, they utilize various chain techniques, ranging from heavy, armor-smashing swings to nimble movements used for disarming opponents or sneaking up on victims from behind. While many Nye appear identical in size, they possess supernatural abilities including the capacity to move with grace, run lightly, and travel unseen. They are fundamentally tied to their environment; many are unable to leave [[the House]], and they serve as a core component of the [[essence]] of [[Valinhall]]. The most prominent member of this species is known as the [[Eldest]], a title passed down through generations. Unlike most Nye who are taller than humans, the [[Eldest]] is shorter and appears hunched with age, though he glides across surfaces without visible feet. He possesses significant power, including the ability to see much of what occurs and to manifest light. [[The Nye]] have a history tied to the [[Territory]], which was unified by a figure named [[Valin]], their founder. The species experienced a period of prosperity when twelve humans resided and trained in their domain, bringing [[life]] to the [[Territory]].}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are shadow-folk inhabiting [[Valinhall]] who serve as the keepers of [[the House]]. Composed of layers of black cloth and pale moonlight that flows like blood, these beings wear black robes and move with a grace that is both silent and swift. They utilize black chains to strangle outsiders and test those who seek them with rage, though they cannot be killed by swords and view such wounds as badges of honor. Bound to their home, [[the Nye]] do not leave [[the House]] and possess an [[essence]] capable of slowing time. They are known to craft thin leather shoes and can walk unseen or run lightly through their domain.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are shadow-folk described as humanoids made of cloth and shadow who attempt to strangle outsiders with chains.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] serve as the keepers of [[the House]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] craft thin leather shoes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] cannot be killed by a [[sword]] and seek such injuries as badges of honor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are composed of layers of black cloth and pale moonlight that flows like blood.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are described as having movements that are both graceful and eerily silent.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] use black chains as weapons.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] test individuals who seek them with rage.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are inhabitants of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9">''House of Blades'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] possess the grace to move swiftly, walk unseen, and run lightly.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] wear black robes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A [[Nye]] stood behind [[Simon]] holding chains around his throat in a metal noose.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] are bound to [[the House]] and cannot stay out of it for too long.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] do not leave their home.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[The Nye]] possess an [[essence]] that can slow time.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] are beings composed of shadows and clothing that possess an [[essence]] of moonlight used to accelerate [[Indirial]]. Residing in [[Valinhall]], these entities appear as men wearing black clothes and hooded cloaks, though they often resemble bundles of cloth brought to [[life]]. Led by an [[Eldest]], the group typically performs armory duties such as repairing weapons with a forge and returning swords to their racks in the entry hall. During an encounter, one member used cold metal to constrict [[Simon]]'s throat, revealing a characteristic cold breath. Ultimately, [[the Nye]] collapse back into mere shadows and moonlight [[essence]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] are a group associated with moonlight [[essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] is accelerated by the power of [[the Nye]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] are people in [[Valinhall]] who use a forge to repair weapons.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] are responsible for returning swords to their racks in the entry hall.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] usually do the work of repairing things from the armory.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] are beings of shadows and clothes with an [[essence]] that provides [[life]] and power.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] have an [[Eldest]] who leads them.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] have other concerns today.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] appear as men in black clothes and hooded black cloaks.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] appear to be bundles of cloth given [[life]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] collapse into shadows and moonlight [[essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Nye]] used a length of cold metal to draw tight around [[Simon]]'s throat.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] possess a cold breath.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] are a powerful group of beings that exist as shadowy forms capable of swarming like ants. These entities possess the ability to materialize seemingly out of nowhere and can communicate with or manipulate intelligent guardians. During an attack on the inhabitants of [[Valinhall]] intended to test their alertness, [[the Nye]] lost their grip on their chains. Despite their presence in various locations, they remain a group that [[Valin]] has never been able to understand.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] have significant power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] attack inhabitants of [[Valinhall]] to test their alertness.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] lost their grip on their chains during the attack.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Nye]] can materialize seemingly out of nowhere.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] are a group of beings that [[Valin]] has never been able to understand.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] are shadowy forms that can swarm like ants.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] can manipulate and communicate with intelligent guardians.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] is a group or entity present in the room.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“We simply test you,” the Nye said. “You seek us with rage in your heart, try to find us in our homes.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Valinhall’s powers are too strange and unshaped in its far reaches, and not even the boldest of the Nye dare to venture too deep."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
